title: fix(ui): export @pollinations/ui/auth/sdk subpath
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
PR #11697 added the `auth/sdk` module and an `apps/react` consumer (`UserAvatar`) but never wired the subpath, so the `react.pollinations.ai` vite build failed on main with `Missing "./auth/sdk" specifier in "@pollinations/ui"` ([run](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/actions/runs/27461729232)).

- Add `auth/sdk` entry to `packages/ui/tsup.config.ts` so `dist/auth/sdk.*` is built
- Add `./auth/sdk` export to `packages/ui/package.json` (matches sibling subpaths + the README)

Verified locally: `packages/ui` build emits `dist/auth/sdk.{js,cjs,d.ts}`; the `react.pollinations.ai` build now succeeds.

gist.headline: Wiring the Subpaths
gist.blurb: Fixed a missing export path in the UI package so the React app can build smoothly again.
gist.summary: Added the missing `./auth/sdk` export to the `@pollinations/ui` package and updated the tsup config to resolve Vite build failures.
gist.impact: Developers using the UI package can now correctly import from `@pollinations/ui/auth/sdk`, and internal React builds succeed.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee fixing a broken wire or plugging a cable into a retro computer/server rack to represent fixing a broken build path.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, plugging a glowing lime green (#ecf874) cable into a retro server rack. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
